title.ko: 분리(습식법에 의한 고체와 고체의 분리 B03B, B03D; 풍력테이블 또는 풍력선광기에 의한 것 B03B; 다른 건식법에 의한 것 B07; 자기 또는 정전기에 의한 고체 또는 유체로부터의 고체의 분리, 고압전기장에 의한 분리 B03C; 원심분리기 과류장치 B04; 액체 함유물로부터 유체를 짜내는데 쓰이는 프레스 그 자체 B30B9/02; 수(水)처리 C02F, 예. 이온교환에 의한 연화 1/42; 냉방장치, 가습기 또는 통풍장치에서 여과기의 설치 또는 부착 F24F13/28)
title.en: SEPARATION (separating solids from solids by wet methods B03B, B03D, by pneumatic jigs or tables B03B, by other dry methods B07;magnetic or electrostatic separation of solid materials from solid materials or fluids, separation by high-voltage electric fields B03C;centrifuges B04B; vortex apparatus B04C;presses per se for squeezing-out liquid from liquid-containing material B30B0009020000)

definition.ko: 증발; 증류; 승화 B01D1/00; 3/00; 5/00; 7/00 콜드 트랩(COLD TRAPS), 콜드버퍼(COLD BAFFLES) B01D8/00 정석(晶析) B01D9/00 용제추출 B01D11/00 액체의 처리：치환, 흡착, 분리, 탈기, 크로마토그래피 B01D12/00, B01D15/00, B01D17/00, B01D19/00 가스 또는 증기의 처리; 분리, 회수, 현탁입자의 화학적 또는 생물학적 분리 B01D53/00 액체로부터 현탁입자의 분리 침전에 의한 것 B01D21/00 여과에 의한 것 공정 B01D37/00 중력여과기; 여과체형상의 여과기, 가압 또는 흡인여과기 B01D24/00; 25/00; 29/00 카트리지(CARTRIDGE) 여과기 B01D27/00 유동하는 여과체가 있는 여과기 B01D33/00 여과장치 B01D35/00 여과계통 및 조합 B01D36/00 타공정에 의한 것 B01D43/00 기체 또는 증기중에 분산되어 있는 입자의 분리 기체 또는 증기의 전(前)처리 B01D51/00 중력, 관성, 원심력 의한 것; 여과에 의한 것; 장치의 조합에 의한 것 B01D45/00; 46/00; 50/00 다른 방법에 의한 것 B01D47/00, B01D49/00 여과재 B01D39/00, B01D41/00 동위원소의 분리 B01D59/00 흡수, 흡착, 크로마토그래피；그 외의 분리 방법 B01D15/00, B01D15/08, B01D53/02, B01D53/14；57/00 반투막을 이용한 분리; 투석, 삼투, 한외 여과 B01D61/00～ 71/00

title.ko: 증발(고체재료의 건조 또는 그것으로부터 액체를 증발시킨 물품 F26B)
title.en: Evaporating (drying solid materials or objects by evaporating liquids therefrom F26B)

title.ko: 수직관이 붙은 증발관
단관(길이가 짧은 관)이 있는 것(B01D 1/12이 우선)
장관(길이가 긴 관)이 있는 것, 예. 케스너(Kestner) 증발관(B01D 1/12이 우선)
title.en: with long tubes, e.g. Kestner evaporators (B01D0001120000 takes precedence)
with heated gases or vapours in contact with the liquid

title.ko: 분무에 의한 것(B01D 1/22이 우선)
건조고체를 얻기 위한 것(B01D 1/24이 우선)
title.en: to obtain dry solids (B01D0001240000 takes precedence)
by bringing a thin layer of the liquid into contact with a heated surface

title.ko: 가스상 매질과 접촉한 액체의 증류 또는 관련된 물질교환 공정, 예. 스트리핑 (Stripping)
title.en: Distillation or related exchange processes in which liquids are contacted with gaseous media, e.g. stripping

title.ko: 회전용기내에서의 것; 회전판에의 분무(B01D 3/10이 우선)
title.en: in rotating vessels; Atomisation on rotating discs (B01D0003100000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 진공증류(B01D 3/12이 우선)

title.en: Fractionating columns in which vapour bubbles through liquid
Bubble caps; Risers for vapour; Discharge pipes for liquid
with horizontal sieve plates or grids; Construction of sieve plates or grids
with sloping plates or elements mounted stepwise
Fractionating columns in which vapour and liquid flow pass each other, or in which the fluid is sprayed into the vapour, or in which a two-phase mixture is passed in one direction
Fractionating columns with surface contact and vertical guides, e.g. film action
Fractionating columns with movable parts or in which centrifugal movement is caused
with one or more auxiliary substances

title.ko: 증기의 응축; 응축에 의한 휘발성용제의 회수(B01D 8/00이 우선; 응축기 F28B)
title.en: Condensation of vapours; Recovering volatile solvents by condensation (B01D0008000000 takes precedence;condensers F28B)

title.ko: 승화(B01D 8/00이 우선; 동결건조 F26)
기상으로부터 직접 결정화(단결정으로 C30B 23/00)
title.en: Crystallisation directly from the vapour phase (into single crystals C30B0023000000)

title.ko: 결정화(晶析) (기상으로부터 직접 결정화 B01D 7/02; 단결정의 제조 C30B)
title.en: Crystallisation (crystallisation directly from the vapour phase B01D0007020000;making single crystals C30B)
concentrating solutions by removing frozen solvent therefrom
Displacing liquid, e.g. from wet solids or from dispersions of liquids or from solids in liquids, by means of another liquid

title.ko: 고체 흡착제에 의한 액체의 처리를 포함한 분리방법; 그 장치
title.en: Separating processes involving the treatment of liquids with solid sorbents; Apparatus therefor

title.ko: 흡착제로서 이온 교환제를 이용하는 것(B01D 15/36이 우선)
title.en: with ion-exchange materials as adsorbents (B01D0015360000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 선택적 흡착, 예. 크로마토그래피

definition.ko: 그룹 B01D 15/08이 일반적으로 크로마토그래피에 관한 완전한 서치를 위한 기초를 제공하기 위해서, 모든 중요한 주제 사항이, 그것이 주로 응용 지향 개소로 분류되었다고 해도 덧붙여 이 그룹으로 분류한다. 예를 들면, 유제품 A23C 9/148, 혈액의 처리, 예. A61M 1/36, 광학 활성 유기 화합물 C07B 57/00 또는 펩티드 C07K 1/16

title.en: characterised by constructional or operational features
relating to the preparation of the feed
relating to the introduction of the feed to the apparatus
relating to the conditioning of the fluid carrier
relating to the conditioning of the sorbent material
relating to the construction of the column
relating to the treatment of the fractions to be distributed

title.ko: 분리 기구에 특징이 있는 것

title.en: Bonded phase chromatography, e.g. with normal bonded phase, reversed phase or hydrophobic interaction
Size-selective separation, e.g. size-exclusion chromatography; Gel filtration; Permeation
involving ionic interaction, e.g. ion-exchange, ion-pair, ion-suppression or ion-exclusion

title.ko: 그룹 B01D15/30­B01D15/36 중 2이상의 그룹에 포함 되지 않는 특정의 상호작용을 포함하는 것, 예. 친화성, 배위자 교환 또는 키랄 크로마토그래피
title.en: involving specific interaction not covered by one or more of groups B01D0015300000-B01D0015360000, e.g. affinity, ligand exchange or chiral chromatography
using supercritical fluid as mobile phase or eluent
characterised by the development mode, e.g. by displacement or by elution

title.ko: 달리 적당한 분류가 없는 액체의 분리, 예. 열확산에 의한 것
title.en: Separation of liquids, not provided for elsewhere, e.g. by thermal diffusion

title.ko: 비혼합성 액체의 분리

title.en: by contact with a preferentially wettable solid
by gravity, in a settling tank
provided with a set of baffles
provided with special equipment for removing at least one of the separated liquids
by using gas-bubbles or moving solids introduced into the mixture

title.ko: 원심력에 의한 것(원심분리기 B04B; 싸이클론 B04C)

title.en: Separation of liquids from each other by electricity
Auxiliary equipment particularly adapted for use with liquid-separating apparatus, e.g. control circuits

title.ko: 침전에 의한 액체로부터 현탁입자의 분리(차별 침전 B03D 3/00)
title.en: Separation of suspended solid particles from liquids by sedimentation (differential sedimentation B03D0003000000)
Construction of the scrapers or the driving mechanisms for settling tanks
Feed or discharge mechanisms for settling tanks
Separation of sediment aided by centrifugal force
Mechanical auxiliary equipment for acceleration of sedimentation, e.g. by vibrators or the like
Density control of clear liquid or sediment, e.g. optical control
Controlling the feed distribution; Controlling the liquid level

title.ko: 성긴 여과재로 구성된 여과기, 예. 각각의 입자 또는 유 지 사이에 점결제로 결합되지 않은 여과재(B01D 27/02가 우선)
성긴 여과재로 구성된 여과기, 예. 각각의 입자 또는 유 지 사이에 점결제로 결합되지 않은 여과재(B01D 27/02가 우선)
title.en: Filters comprising loose filtering material, i.e. filtering material without any binder between the individual particles or fibres thereof (B01D0027020000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 여과조작중 정지하고 있는 여과층(filter bed)를 갖는 것
title.en: with the filter bed stationary during the filtration

title.ko: 여과재가 비침투성 고정벽 사이에 고정되어 있는 것(B01D 24/10, B01D 24/20이 우선)
title.en: the filtering material being clamped between pervious fixed walls (B01D0024100000, B01D0024200000 take precedence)
the pervious walls comprising a series of louvres or slots
the filtering material being supported by at least two pervious coaxial walls

title.ko: 여과재가 밀폐 용기 내에 담겨 있는 것
title.en: the filtering material being held in a closed container

title.ko: 하향(downward)여과. 여과재가 침투성 표면에 의해 지지되어 있는 것(B01D 24/18이 우선)
title.en: Downward filtration, the filtering material being supported by pervious surfaces (B01D0024180000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 하향 여과, 용기가 분배 또는 집합헤더(headers)를 갖거나 침투성 도관을 갖는 것(B01D 24/18이 우선)
title.en: Downward filtration, the container having distribution or collection headers or pervious conduits (B01D0024180000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 상향(upward)여과(B01D 24/18이 우선)

title.en: the filtering material being provided in an open container
Downward filtration, the filter material being supported by pervious surfaces
Downward filtration, the container having distribution or collection headers or pervious conduits

title.ko: 여과중 여과층이 이동하는 것(여과층이 이동하는 것 B01D 24/36)
title.en: with the filter bed moving during the filtration (with the filter bed fluidised B01D0024360000)

title.ko: 여과재와 함께 침투성 지지체가 이동하는 것(경사된 그릇 또는 접시를 갖는 것 B01D 33/327)
title.en: with the filtering material and its pervious support moving (tipping buckets, trays or like sections B01D0033327000)

title.ko: 여과조작중 여과층이 유동하는 것(여과층이 고정된 것 B01D 24/02)
title.en: with the filter bed fluidised during the filtration (with the filter bed being stationary B01D0024020000)
for discharging filter cake, e.g. chutes

title.ko: 여과기내에서 여과재의 재생(B01D 24/44가 우선)
title.en: Regenerating the filtering material in the filter (B01D0024440000 takes precedence)
integrally combined with devices for controlling the filtration

title.ko: 복수의 여과체 또는 그와 유사한 여과체로 된 여과요소를 여러개 조합하여 구성한 여과기(디스크 여과기 B01D 29/39)
title.en: Filters formed by clamping together several filtering elements or parts of such elements (disc filters B01D0029390000)
in which the elements are pre-formed independent filtering units, e.g. modular systems

title.ko: 필터프레스, 즉 여판(濾板)형 또는 여판(濾板) 및 여쇄(濾碎)프레임형의 것
title.en: Filter presses, i.e. of the plate or plate and frame type

title.ko: 여과조작중에 하나 또는 그 이상의 이동가능한 여과대(filter bands)가 필터판들 사이 또는 필터판과 프레임사이에 클램프(clamp)되어 있는 것, 예. 지그재그 엔들리스(endless) 여과대(B01D 25/172, B01D 25/176, B01D 25/19가 우선)
title.en: with one or more movable filter bands arranged to be clamped between the press plates or between a plate and a frame during filtration, e.g. zigzag endless filter bands (B01D0025172000, B01D0025176000, B01D0025190000 take precedence)
with compression of the filter cake, e.g. by inflatable membranes

title.ko: 여판(chamber plate) 프레스, 즉 여과체가 두개의 연속으로 있는 여과판 사이에 고정(clamped)되어 있는 것(B01D 25/127, B01D 25/172, B01D 25/176, B01D 25/19가 우선)
title.en: Chamber-plate presses, i.e. the sides of the filtering elements being clamped between two successive filtering plates (B01D0025127000, B01D0025172000, B01D0025176000, B01D0025190000 take precedence)
with compression of the filter cake, e.g. by inflatable membranes

title.ko: 여판을 여는 수단(필터케이크의 제거 B01D 25/32)
title.en: Plate spreading means (removal of filter cakes B01D0025320000)
attaching the filter element to the filter press plates, e.g. around the central feed hole in the plates
Clamping means for closing the filter press, e.g. hydraulic jacks

title.ko: 판프레스와 프레임프레스(B01D 25/172, B01D 25/176, B01D 25/19가 우선)
title.en: Plate and frame presses (B01D0025172000, B01D0025176000, B01D0025190000 take precedence)
Leaching or washing filter cakes in the filter
by moving parts, e.g. scrapers, contacting stationary filter elements
Cartridge filters of the throw-away type
with cartridges made from a mass of loose material
with cartridges made of a piece of unitary material, e.g. filter paper
with corrugated, folded or wound material
having a coaxial stream through the filtering element
having more than one filtering element

title.ko: 그룹 B01D 24/00-B01D 27/00에 포함되지 않는, 여과조작을 하는 동안 고정된 여과 요소를 가지는 여과체, 예. 가압 또는 흡입 여과체; 그 여과 요소
title.en: Filters with filtering elements stationary during filtration, e.g. pressure or suction filters, not covered by groups B01D0024000000-B01D0027000000;   Filtering elements therefor

title.ko: 평편한 여과체를 가진 것(B01D 29/39가 우선)
title.en: with flat filtering elements (B01D0029390000 takes precedence)
with corrugated, folded or wound filtering sheets

located in a closed housing and comprising scrapers or agitators on the cake side of the filtering elements, e.g. Nutsche- or Rosenmund-type filters for performing multiple step operations such as chemical reactions, filtering and cake treatment
with filtering bands, e.g. movable between filtering operations
with bag, cage, hose, tube, sleeve or like filtering elements
on solid frames with surface grooves or the like
with corrugated, folded or wound sheets
with hollow discs side by side on, or around, one or more tubes, e.g. of the leaf type
mounted otherwise than transversely on the tube
Edge filtering elements, i.e. using contiguous impervious surfaces
of spirally or helically wound bodies

title.ko: 상호간의 배열에 의해 특징지어지는 다단형 여과체(B01D 29/39 우선)
title.en: with multiple filtering elements, characterised by their mutual disposition (B01D0029390000 takes precedence)
integrally combined with devices for controlling the filtration

title.ko: 여과기내의 여과재의 재생(다수 유니트로 된 여과재의 취출장치, 예. 재생을 위한 교환 B01D 35/12)
title.en: Regenerating the filter material in the filter (devices for taking out of action one or more units of multi-unit filters, e.g. for regeneration, B01D0035120000)
by scrapers, brushes or the like, acting on the cake side of the filtering element
with backwash arms, shoes or nozzles
by forces created by movement of the filter element

title.ko: 재생이외의 목적으로 여과기내의 필터케이크를 처리하는 것(B01D 29/94 우선)
title.en: Handling the filter cake in the filter for purposes other than for regenerating (B01D0029940000 takes precedence)
Retarding cake deposition on the filter during the filtration period, e.g. using stirrers
for discharging the filter cake, e.g. chutes

title.ko: 여과작업중 여과체가 운동하는 것 여과체의 제거 또는 대체를 위한 특별한 수단; 여과기를 위한 이송시스템(B01D 29/09, B01D 29/70이 우선)
title.en: in which the filtering elements are moved between filtering operations; Particular measures for removing or replacing the filtering elements; Transport systems for filters (B01D0029090000, B01D0029700000 take precedence)

title.ko: 여과작업중 운동하는 여과체가 있는 여과기(여과작업중 부정형 여과재가 운동 또는 유동하는 여과기 B01D 24/28-B01D 24/36; 원심분리기 B04B)
title.en: Filters with filtering elements which move during the filtering operation (filters comprising loose filtering material moving or fluidised during filtration B01D0024280000-B01D0024360000;centrifuges B04B)

title.ko: 전후운동하는 여과체를 갖는 것, 예. 피스톤(B01D 33/04-B01D 33/327이 우선)
title.en: with translationally moving filtering elements, e.g. pistons (B01D0033040000-B01D0033327000 take precedence)
with filtering bands or the like supported on cylinders which are impervious for filtering

title.ko: 여과중에 침투성 실린더에 지지된 여과대 또는 이와 유사한 것을 갖는 것
title.en: with filtering bands or the like supported on cylinders which are pervious for filtering

title.ko: 단부가 없는 여과대를 갖는 것
압착수단과 결합한 것(B01D 33/64가 우선)
title.en: combined with a compression device (B01D0033640000 takes precedence)
Construction of filtering bands or supporting belts, e.g. devices for centering, mounting or sealing the filtering bands or the supporting belts

title.ko: 회전하는 실린더형 여과표면을 가진 것, 예. 중공드럼(B01D 33/044가 우선)
title.en: with rotary cylindrical filtering surfaces, e.g. hollow drums (B01D0033044000 takes precedence)
Construction of the filtering drums, e.g. mounting or sealing arrangements
with surface cells independently connected to pressure distributors
with surface cells independently connected to pressure distributors

title.ko: 회전평면 여과표면이 있는 것
회전하는 여과테이블을 가진 것(독립적으로 기울일 수 있는 버켓, 트레이등의 섹션으로 나눠지는 테이블 B01D 33/327)
title.en: with rotary filtering tables (tables divided into separately tiltable buckets, trays or like sections B01D0033327000)
the table surface being divided in successively tilted sectors or cells, e.g. for discharging the filter cake
with hollow filtering discs transversely mounted on a hollow rotary shaft
Construction of discs or component sectors thereof
with hollow frames axially mounted on a hollow rotary shaft
with rotary filtering surfaces, which are neither cylindrical nor planar, e.g. helical surfaces

title.ko: 여과체의 운동이 여러가지 운동을 결합한 것(B01D 33/19가 우선)
title.en: the movement of the filter elements being a combination of movements (B01D0033190000 takes precedence)
Tipping buckets, trays or like sections

title.ko: 각각의 여과체가 닫힌 회로를 따라 움직이는 것(경사된 그릇, 접시 또는 이와 유사한 것 B01D 33/327)
title.en: with individual filtering elements moving along a closed path (tipping buckets, trays or like sections B01D0033327000)

title.ko: 상호간의 배열에 따라 특징지어지는 다수의 여과체를 가진 것(B01D 33/21이 우선)
title.en: with multiple filtering elements characterised by their mutual disposition (B01D0033210000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 여과기내에서 여과재의 재생(다수 유니트로 된 여과재의 취출장치, 예. 재생을 위한 교환 B01D 35/12)
title.en: Regenerating the filter material in the filter (devices for taking out of action one or more units of multi-unit filters, e.g. for regeneration, B01D0035120000)
by scrapers, brushes or the like acting on the cake-side of the filtering element
with backwash arms, shoes or nozzles
by forces created by movement of the filter element

title.ko: 재생이외의 목적으로 여과기내의 필터케이크를 처리하는 것(B01D 33/76이 우선)
title.en: Handling the filter cake in the filter for purposes other than for regenerating (B01D0033760000 takes precedence)
Retarding cake deposition on the filter during the filtration period, e.g. using stirrers

title.ko: 급송 또는 배출장치를 가진 것(B01D 33/82가 우선)
title.en: having feed or discharge devices (B01D0033820000 takes precedence)
for discharging the filter cake, e.g. chutes

title.ko: 그룹 B01D 24/00-B01D 33/00에 특히 포함되지 않는 특징을 가졌거나 그룹 B01D 24/00-B01D 33/00에 특히 포함되지 않는 어플리케이션을 위한 여과장치; 여과조작을 위한 부속장치; 필터 하우징 구조
title.en: Filtering devices having features not specifically covered by groups B01D0024000000-B01D0033000000, or for applications not specifically covered by groups B01D0024000000-B01D0033000000; Auxiliary devices for filtration; Filter housing constructions
Devices for the removal of gas, e.g. air purge systems

title.ko: 특수한 곳에 설치하기 위하여 미리 마련된 여과기, 예. 파이프 라인, 펌프, 스톱콕크(stop-cock) (B01D 35/05가 우선)
title.en: Filters adapted for location in special places, e.g. pipe-lines, pumps, stop-cocks (B01D0035050000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 탱크나 저장기(reservoirs)위에 단단히 부착된 것(B01D 35/04가 우선)
title.en: rigidly mounted in or on tanks or reservoirs (B01D0035040000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 전기 및 자기를 이용한 여과체(한외(限外)여과, 미량여과 B01D 61/14; 전기투석, 전기삼투 B01D 61/42; 여과체와 자기분리기의 조합 B03C 1/30)
title.en: Filters making use of electricity or magnetism (ultrafiltration, microfiltration B01D0061140000;electrodialysis, electro-osmosis B01D0061420000; combinations of filters and magnetic separators B03C0001300000)
Devices for taking out of action one or more units of multi-unit filters, e.g. for regeneration

title.ko: 특히 여과에 적합한 안전장치; 폐색(clogging)지시장치(throw away필터에 결합된 것 B01D 27/10)
title.en: Safety devices specially adapted for filtration; Devices for indicating clogging (incorporated in a throw-away filter B01D0027100000)
Flow control valves; Damping or calibrated passages

title.ko: 여과장치의 진동(정지하고 있는 여과체를 갖는 여과기에서 진동에 의한 여과재의 재생 B01D 29/72; 운동하는 여과체를 가진 여과기에서 진동에 의한 필터케이크의 배출 B01D 33/54, B01D 33/76)
title.en: Vibrating the filters (regenerating filter material by vibrations in filters with stationary filtering elements B01D0029720000;discharging the filter cake by vibrations in filters with moving filtering elements B01D0033540000, B01D0033760000)
Directing the mixture to be filtered on to the filters in a manner to clean the filters
Providing loose granular material to scratch the filters clean

title.ko: 여과장치의 하우징구조

title.en: including arrangements for environmental protection, e.g. pressure resisting features

title.ko: 상면이 개방된 것(B01D 35/31이 우선)
여과계통 또는 여과장치와 그 밖의 분리장치와의 조합(가스제거장치, 예. 공기배출장치 B01D 35/01; 여과체와 결합된 자기적 또는 정전기적 분리장치 B03C)
title.en: Filter circuits or combinations of filters with other separating devices (devices for the removal of gas, e.g. air purge systems B01D0035010000;magnetic or electrostatic separators combined with filters B03C)

title.ko: 다른 종류의 여과장치와의 조합(B01D 29/50, B01D 33/35가 우선)
title.en: Combinations of filters of different kinds (B01D0029500000, B01D0033350000 take precedence)
Combinations of filters with settling tanks

title.ko: 여과공정(가스를 여과하기에 특히 적합한 프로세서 B01D 46/00)
title.en: Processes of filtration (processes specially adapted for filtering gases B01D0046000000)
Precoating the filtering elements or material; Addition of filter aids to the liquid being filtered

title.ko: 액체 또는 가스 유체용 여과재
title.en: Filtering material for liquid or gaseous fluids
Loose filtering material, e.g. loose fibres
Inorganic material, e.g. asbestos fibres, glass beads or fibres

title.ko: 여과포, 즉 짜거나 뜬것 또는 교직된 것(금속제 B01D 39/10)
title.en: Filter cloth, i.e. woven, knitted or interlaced material (metallic B01D0039100000)
Filter screens essentially made of metal
of wire gauze; of knitted wire; of expanded metal
of organic material, e.g. synthetic fibres
the material being cellulose or derivatives thereof
of inorganic material, e.g. asbestos paper or metallic filtering material of non-woven wires
Regeneration of the filtering material or filter elements outside the filter for liquid or gaseous fluids

title.ko: 침전 또는 여과와는 다른 방법에 의한 액체로부터의 고체입자 또는 고체로부터 액체의 분리(부유선별 B03D 1/00; 고형물등의 건조 F26B)
title.en: Separating particles from liquids, or liquids from solids, otherwise than by sedimentation or filtration (flotation processes B03D0001000000;drying solid materials or objects F26B)

title.ko: 중력, 관성력 또는 원심력에 의한 가스 또는 증기로부터의 분산입자의 분리
title.en: Separating dispersed particles from gases or vapours

title.ko: 중력, 관성력 또는 원심력에 의한 가스 또는 증기로부터의 분산입자의 분리
title.en: Separating dispersed particles from gases or vapours by gravity, inertia, or centrifugal forces

title.ko: 관성력에 의한 것(B01D 45/12가 우선)

title.en: by reversal of direction of flow

title.ko: 원심력에 의한 것(원심분리기 B04B; 사이클론 B04C)

title.en: generated by rotating vanes, discs, drums or brushes
generated by the winding course of the gas stream

title.ko: 기체 또는 증기로부터 분산 입자를 분리하기 위해 특별히 개량된 여과기 또는 여과공정 (여과체 B01D24/00 ~ B01D35/00; 여과 재료 B01D39/00; 필터 외부에서의 재생 B01D41/00)
title.en: Filters or filtering processes specially modified for separating dispersed particles from gases or vapours  (filtering elements B01D0024000000-B01D0035000000; filtering material B01D0039000000; their regeneration outside the filters B01D0041000000)
Particle separators, e.g. dust precipitators, having hollow filters made of flexible material
with means keeping the working surfaces flat
the working surfaces forming a star shape
Particle separators, e.g. dust precipitators, using filter plates, sheets or pads having plane surfaces
Particle separators, e.g. dust precipitators, using filtering belts
Particle separators, e.g. dust precipitators, using rigid hollow filter bodies
Particle separators, e.g. dust precipitators, using filter brushes
Particle separators, e.g. dust precipitators, using loose filtering material
as a substantially horizontal layer, e.g. on rotary tables, drums or conveyor belts
Particle separators, e.g. dust precipitators, using edge filters, i.e. using contiguous impervious surfaces
Removing dust other than cleaning filters
Particle separators, e.g. dust precipitators, using filters embodying folded material
Particle separators, e.g. dust precipitators, using ultra-fine filter sheets or diaphragms

title.ko: 상호 배치가 특징인 다중 여과체를 포함하는 (B01D46/12가 우선)
title.en: with multiple filtering elements, characterised by their mutual disposition (B01D0046120000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 필터 내부의 여과재 또는 여과체의 재생(B01D46/04, B01D46/48 우선)
title.en: Regeneration of the filtering material or filter elements inside the filter (B01D0046040000, B01D0046480000 take precedence)
by means acting on the cake side involving movement with regard to the filter elements
by scrapers, brushes or the like
by means acting on the cake side without movement with respect to the filter elements, e.g. fixed nozzles
by acting counter-currently on the filtering surface, e.g. by flushing on the non-cake side of the filter
with pressurised gas, e.g. pulsed air
with backwash arms, shoes or nozzles
by forces created by movement of the filter element
Chemical processes for the removal of the retained particles, e.g. by burning
Cleaning the filter surface by interrupting suction so that the filter cake falls by gravity
Devices for taking out of action one or more units of multi-unit filters, e.g. for regeneration or maintenance

title.ko: 분리제로서 액체를 사용하고 기체, 공기 또는 증기로부터의 분산입자분리(B01D 45/10이 우선; 분류탑 또는 그 부분구조 B01D 3/16)
title.en: Separating dispersed particles from gases, air or vapours by liquid as separating agent (B01D0045100000 takes precedence;fractionating columns or parts thereof B01D0003160000)
by passing the gas or air or vapour over or through a liquid bath
by passing the gas or air or vapour through foam
by condensation of the separating agent

title.ko: 복수의 세정부(洗淨部)가 있는 탑(B01D 47/14가 우선)
title.en: Washers with plural different washing sections (B01D0047140000 takes precedence)
Apparatus having rotary means, other than rotatable nozzles, for atomising the cleaning liquid
Separating dispersed particles from gases, air or vapours by other methods

title.ko: 가스 또는 증기로부터 입자를 분리하기 위한 방법 또는 장치의 조합
title.en: Combinations of methods or devices for separating particles from gases or vapours

definition.ko: 그룹 B01D50/10은 그룹 B01D50/20 ~ B01D50/60에 우선한다.

title.ko: 장치의 조합은 그룹 B01D45/00, B01D46/00 및 B01D47/00에 포함된다.
title.en: Combinations of devices covered by groups B01D0045000000, B01D0046000000 and B01D0047000000

title.ko: 장치의 조합은 그룹 B01D45/00 및 B01D46/00에 포함된다.
title.en: Combinations of devices covered by groups B01D0045000000 and B01D0046000000

title.ko: 장치의 조합은 그룹 B01D45/00 및 B01D47/00에 포함된다.
title.en: Combinations of devices covered by groups B01D0045000000 and B01D0047000000

title.ko: 장치의 조합은 그룹 B01D46/00 및 B01D47/00에 포함된다.
title.en: Combinations of devices covered by groups B01D0046000000 and B01D0047000000
Auxiliary pretreatment of gases or vapours to be cleaned from dispersed particles
Amassing the particles, e.g. by flocculation
by seeding, e.g. by adding particles
by varying the pressure of the gas or vapour
Conditioning the gas to be cleaned

title.ko: 가스 또는 증기의 분리; 기체로부터 휘발성 용제증기의 회수; 폐가스, 예를 들어 엔진배기가스, 매연, 연기굴뚝연기 등의 화학적 또는 생물학적 정화; 또는 에어로졸(응축에 의한 휘발성 용제의 회수 B01D 5/00; 승화 B01D 7/00; 콜드 트랩, 콜드 배플 B01D 8/00; 액화에 의한 난응축성가스 또는 공기의 분리 F25J 3/00)
title.en: Separation of gases or vapours; Recovering vapours of volatile solvents from gases; Chemical or biological purification of waste gases, e.g. engine exhaust gases, smoke, fumes, flue gases or aerosols (recovery of volatile solvents by condensation B01D0005000000;sublimation B01D0007000000;cold traps, cold baffles B01D0008000000; separation of difficult-to-condense gases or air by liquefaction F25J0003000000)

definition.ko: 그룹 B01D53/34는 그룹 B01D53/02 ~ B01D53/32에 우선함

title.en: by adsorption, e.g. preparative gas chromatography

title.ko: 흡수에 의한 것
흡수체; 그 액분배기(B01D 3/16, B01D 3/26, B01D 3/30이 우선)
title.en: Absorbing units; Liquid distributors therefor (B01D0003160000, B01D0003260000, B01D0003300000 take precedence)

title.ko: 원심력에 의한 것(원심분리기 B04B; 사이클론 B04C)

title.en: Selection of materials for use as drying agents

title.ko: 그룹 B01D 61/00에 관련된 이외의 전기적 효과에 의한 것
title.en: by electrical effects other than those provided for in group B01D0061000000

title.ko: 폐가스의 화학적 또는 생물학적 정화
title.en: Chemical or biological purification of waste gases

title.ko: 미확인 구조 성분의 제거
산성의 것(B01D 53/44가 우선)
염기성의 것(B01D 53/44가 우선)
미확인 구조 성분의 제거
유황성분
SOx (B01D 53/60이 우선)
질소 화합물
NOx (B01D 53/60이 우선)

title.en: Simultaneously removing sulfur oxides and nitrogen oxides
Heavy metals or compounds thereof, e.g. mercury

title.ko: 그룹 B01D 53/48～ B01D 53/70에 포함되지 않는 유기화합물 예. 탄화수소화합물
title.en: Organic compounds not provided for in groups B01D0053480000-B01D0053700000, e.g. hydrocarbons

title.ko: 폐가스의 정화를 위한 일반공정; 특별히 채택된 장치 또는 부속(B01D 53/92가 우선)
title.en: General processes for purification of waste gases; Apparatus or devices specially adapted therefor (B01D0053920000 takes precedence)
Gas phase processes, e.g. by using aerosols
Semi-solid phase processes, i.e. by using slurries

title.ko: 엔진배출가스(배출가스 정화 또는 그밖의 처리수단을 가지고 있는 배출장치 F01N 3/00)
title.en: of engine exhaust gases (exhaust apparatus having means for purifying or otherwise treating exhaust gases F01N0003000000)
Regeneration, reactivation or recycling of reactants

title.ko: 고체의 분리 이외이고 단일한 다른 그룹 또는 서브클래스, 예. B03C에 완전하게는 속하지 않는 분리
title.en: Separation, other than separation of solids, not fully covered by a single other group or subclass, e.g. B03C

title.ko: 동위원소의 분리
title.en: Separation of different isotopes of the same chemical element
by fractional melting; by zone melting
by fractional crystallisation, by precipitation, by zone freezing
by sorption, i.e. absorption, adsorption, persorption

title.ko: 질량분석기(mass Spectrography)에 의하는 분리(입자분광기 또는 입자분리관 H01J 49/00)
title.en: Separation by mass spectrography (particle spectrometers or separator tubes H01J0049000000)

Separation involving two or more processes covered by different groups selected from groups B01D0059020000, B01D0059100000, B01D0059200000, B01D0059220000, B01D0059280000, B01D0059340000, B01D0059360000, B01D0059380000, B01D0059440000

title.ko: 반투막을 이용한 분리공정, 예. 투석, 삼투; 또는 한외여과 특별히 만들어진 관련장치, 부속품 및 보조조작(확산에 의한 가스 또는 증기의 분리 B01D 53/22)
title.en: Processes of separation using semi-permeable membranes, e.g. dialysis, osmosis or ultrafiltration; Apparatus specially adapted therefor; Semi-permeable membranes or their production

title.ko: 반투막을 이용한 분리공정, 예. 투석, 삼투; 또는 한외여과 특별히 만들어진 관련장치, 부속품 및 보조조작(확산에 의한 가스 또는 증기의 분리 B01D 53/22)
title.en: Processes of separation using semi-permeable membranes, e.g. dialysis, osmosis or ultrafiltration; Apparatus, accessories or auxiliary operations specially adapted therefor (separation of gases or vapours by diffusion B01D0053220000)
Dialysate solution flow, e.g. preparation, regeneration
having one or more compartments filled with ion-exchange material
Apparatus in general for separation processes using semi-permeable membranes
Accessories or auxiliary operations, in general, for separation processes or apparatus using semi-permeable membranes
with movable bodies, e.g. foam balls
Prevention of membrane fouling or of concentration polarisation
Testing of membranes or membrane apparatus; Detecting or repairing leaks
Processes specially adapted for manufacturing semi-permeable membranes for separation processes or apparatus

title.ko: 형상, 구조 또는 특성에 의해 특징지어지는 분리공정 또는 장치를 위한 반투막; 이를 위해 특별히 적합한 생산공정
title.en: Semi-permeable membranes for separation processes or apparatus characterised by their form, structure or properties; Manufacturing processes specially adapted therefor

definition.ko: (1) 이 그룹에 있어서 용어의 의미는 아래와 같이 사용한다: - 특성(PROPERTIES)는 기계적, 물리적, 화학적인 특성 모두를 포함한다. (2) 생산공정으로 중요하다고 생각되는 것은 그룹 B01D 67/00에도 분류된다.

title.ko: 유공섬유막(유공섬유의 제조 D01D 5/24, D01F 1/08)
title.en: Hollow fibre membranes (manufacture of hollow fibres D01D0005240000, D01F0001080000)

title.ko: 재료에 의해 특징지어지는 분리공정 또는 장치를 위한 반투막; 이를 위해 특별히 적합한 생산공정
title.en: Semi-permeable membranes for separation processes or apparatus characterised by the material; Manufacturing processes specially adapted therefor

definition.ko: 1. 이 그룹에서 재료가 조성물인 경우에는 구성성분중 가장 비율이 높은 쪽으로 분류된다. 이 구성성분은 최후 개소 법칙을 따른다, 그룹 B01D 61/00의 노트 참조. 만약 가장 비율이 높은 구성성분이 하나이상 있는 경우에는 최후개소법칙에 따라 분류한다. 2. 생산공정이 중요하다고 생각되는 것은 그룹 B01D 67/00에도 분류된다.

title.ko: 유기재료

title.en: Esters of inorganic acids, e.g. cellulose nitrate
Polyalkenylalcohols; Polyalkenylesters; Polyalkenylethers; Polyalkenylaldehydes; Polyalkenylketones; Polyalkenylacetals; Polyalkenylketals
Polymers of unsaturated acids or derivatives thereof, e.g. salts, amides, imides, nitriles, anhydrides, esters

title.ko: 탄소와 탄소의 불포화결합만이 관련된 반응에 의해 얻어진 중합체로서 그룹 B01D 71/26～ B01D 71/42의 어느 단일의 그룹에 속하지 아니하는 것
title.en: Polymers obtained by reactions only involving carbon-to-carbon unsaturated bonds, not provided for in a single one of groups B01D0071260000-B01D0071420000
Other polymers having nitrogen in the main chain, with or without oxygen or carbon only
Polycondensates having nitrogen-containing heterocyclic rings in the main chain
Polyimides; Polyamide-imides; Polyester-imides; Polyamide acids or similar polyimide precursors
Polymers having sulfur in the main chain, with or without nitrogen, oxygen or carbon only
Polymers having silicon in the main chain, with or without sulfur, nitrogen, oxygen or carbon only

title.ko: 탄소-탄소 불포화 결합만이 관계된 반응에 의해 얻어진 것이 아닌 고분자화학물로서 그룹 B01D 71/46～ B01D 71/70의 어느 단일그룹에 속하지 아니하는 것
title.en: Macromolecular compounds obtained otherwise than by reactions only involving carbon-to-carbon unsaturated bonds, not provided for in a single one of groups B01D0071460000-B01D0071700000

title.ko: 천연고분자 물질이나 그 유도체(B01D 71/08, B01D 71/24가 우선)
title.en: Natural macromolecular material or derivatives thereof (B01D0071080000, B01D0071240000 take precedence)

title.ko: 그룹 B01D 71/08～ B01D 71/74의 어느 단일그룹에 특별히 규정되지 않은 중합체 재료(고무는 일반적으로 B01D 71/24)
title.en: Macromolecular material not specifically provided for in a single one of groups B01D0071080000-B01D0071740000 (rubbers in general B01D0071240000)
characterised by the presence of specified groups, e.g. introduced by chemical after-treatment
